use_cases: Navigation menus with animated dropdown content panels
Category or product feature exploration on hover
Settings or options menus with smooth transitions
Tab-based navigation with contextual content reveal
ai_summary: A shifting dropdown navigation component featuring smooth directional animations based on tab selection order. Built with Framer Motion for fluid AnimatePresence transitions, this hover and click-activated tab system reveals content panels with left/right directional motion. The component uses Tailwind CSS for styling and Lucide React icons, making it suitable for SaaS dashboards, e-commerce category navigation, or any interface requiring compact, animated menu systems.
